feedback.issue: Your upper body is leaning too much.
feedback.notes: Drill: short-ball throwdowns to practise timing and compact bat path.
feedback.advice: Keep your head steady during the shot. Keep your torso aligned and balanced over your base. Watch the short ball; rotate hips and keep eyes on the contact point.
feedback.corrections: Head: reduce lateral movement; keep eyes on the ball. Torso: avoid excessive lean; balance over your base.
feedback.summary: Shot detected: Hook. Confidence 0.88. Your upper body is leaning too much.
